Document:
# Zona 14 Rules
These rules apply at all times, including between rounds. Some entries contain explanations as well as rules. Administrators have the final say, as the rules can't cover every possible situation.
- [textlink="1. Don't be an Asshole" link="RuleC1Zona14"] - [textlink="2. No Exploiting or Cheating" link="RuleC2Zona14"] - [textlink="3. No ERP" link="RuleC3Zona14"] - [textlink="4. IC in OOC" link="RuleC4Zona14"] - [textlink="5. Character & Roleplay" link="RuleC5Zona14"] - [textlink="6. Zone Rulings" link="RuleC6Zona14"] - [textlink="7. PvP & Combat" link="RuleC7Zona14"] - [textlink="8. Base Raids" link="RuleC8Zona14"] - [textlink="9. Robbing and Looting" link="RuleC9Zona14"] - [textlink="10. Factions" link="RuleC10Zona14"] - [textlink="11. You're Going to Die. A lot." link="RuleC11Zona14"]
